## Affected crates

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-features -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --all-features` passes
- [ ] `cargo doc --workspace --all-features --no-deps` builds without warnings
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (doc comments) and have tests
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real keys are committed
